reviews.review_description: So the game only has 3 levels and after 3 u get a lot of money but not enough to buy a new item

The game would not even work well i loads up but the main menu it pushes me to the and the hands would not even face where i wanted them to face it would just point towards the main menu i wish i could give this game zero stars
The game is so bad and now I have to pay to continue do not buy this!

developer_response.body:
Hi David, thanks for giving it a try.

I'm sorry to hear the game wasn't for you. However, this is exactly why we offer the first part for free! Since you didn't enjoy the experience, you were able to find that out without spending a single cent. The payment is only there for people who enjoy the demo and want to keep playing.

We appreciate you testing it out, and we're glad the free trial saved you from buying a game you didn't like.

reviews.review_description: Do not buy this game to actually get it you have to pay for a mobile game in vr to hate so stupid

developer_response.body:
Hi,
We offer the first 3 levels completely free so players can test the mechanics and graphics to see if they enjoy the game before spending any money. We believe this is fairer than asking you to pay upfront without knowing what you are getting.

If you enjoyed the first 3 levels, the one-time purchase unlocks the rest of the game. If it’s not for you, you’ve lost nothing! We hope this clears up the confusion.

reviews.review_title: Horrible keep games like this on phones
reviews.review_description: A horrible game that is a generic copy of most low-skill mobile games.
The only downside is that I can't play past level 29 and I paid the $4.99 and still can't move past level 29 I have beaten this level many times but never seen level 30 or more.

So many glitches that it's unplayable.  When you finally restart a few times and get rid of glitches, every level is basically the same so it's boring after a few levels.  Hand tracking is terrible so using any gun besides the starter is impossible. Purchase of the game is an in-app purchase and therefore not refundable through quest store (probably on purpose). Waste of 8 bucks for an unplayable game.

It do glitch a lot but I do enjoy the game . I also paid for all levels. My only problem is the big red man. He just stand there as you shoot. He doesn’t do Anything. How do you get pass him to get to the next level?

Question: I’m at level 28
Is that the highest it goes?

Update:the glitching is better 
Big red guy is gone- thanks 
Needs more  levels - it goes no higher then 28
Great accuracy.. A really fun shooting range.. Ppl are to fussy.. It's addicting

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the awesome review! 😊 We're thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the accuracy and fun of the shooting range. We put a lot of effort into making it addictive and exciting, and feedback like yours means the world to us. 
Keep aiming and shooting, and stay tuned for even more updates. 🎯

Happy gaming,
The Bullet Master Run Team

reviews.review_description: There is no settings and you do 2 levels before it asks you to buy it.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We're sorry to hear the game felt too loud. While we’re working on adding a settings menu with volume control in a future update, you can currently adjust the volume using your VR device's volume buttons.

We’re also reviewing how we introduce the paywall to make the experience smoother. Stay tuned for updates, and we appreciate your support!

Thanks again for your input, and we hope you might give it another shot!

reviews.review_title: Funny, but needs a lot of work
reviews.review_description:
Three levels can be played for free, but if you want to play more, you have to purchase them for $4.99. I decided to buy the game because I was having fun and wanted to try out the other levels. Additionally, there were several updates in between which shows that the developer is working on it, and I want to support that.

I see potential in the game, but it still needs a lot of work. The levels are all very similar, and a good level designer should work on it to make it less repetitive and more engaging. Moreover, there are several bugs that need to be fixed urgently. For instance, it is nearly unpossible to hit men behind the wall, men keep sliding back and forth, the end boss (?) doesn't respond to shots, and you cannot choose levels. How do you play levels 7, 8, or 9 again after playing level 10? Also, it is not possible to quit a level without ending the entire game.

Currently, the game is not worth the money, but I hope it continues to receive updates and gets better in the future.

1.5/5 stars

developer_response.body:
Dear Lord.Wyldbit,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback on VR Meta Game. We greatly appreciate your support and your willingness to invest in our game. We are glad to hear that you enjoyed the initial levels and recognized the updates we have made.

Addressing Your Concerns:

Bugs and Issues:
Hitting Enemies Behind Walls: We are aware of this issue and are working on improving the hit detection to ensure a smoother and more realistic experience.
Sliding Enemies and Non-responsive Boss: These bugs are on our radar, and we are prioritizing fixes in our upcoming updates.
Level Selection and Navigation: We acknowledge the current limitations in level selection. Please note that you can exit a level by holding the left controller option button on the wrist, which will bring up a menu allowing you to navigate through different options, including quitting a level without ending the entire game.
Future Updates and Support: We are committed to continuously improving VR Meta Game. Our team is dedicated to addressing these issues and adding new content to enhance your gaming experience. We aim to make the game worthy of its price and your expectations.
Your Feedback Matters:
Your feedback is crucial in helping us identify areas that need improvement. We are striving to make VR Meta Game a more polished and enjoyable experience for all our players.

reviews.review_description: Yes probably related to the demo nature, but the game is not challenging at all, impossible to lose looks the paid version is better. Definitive kids game.

It's a good fps game, if you want to kill 10-20 minutes. The chase mode is challenging. I enjoy the characters in the game especially the hostages and their dance once you save them. Looks like the developer is fixing some issues, which is always a good thing. Also, I forgot to mention that if I'm in the middle of the map and lose my gun, I can't advance, pick up my gun, or quit. I have to exit the entire game, which is not what you want.
This game looks like a fun gun Vr game but there is one issue my screen flips up side down and it’s un playable but the idea seems great 👍🏻

reviews.review_title: Every time I try to play the game my scr
reviews.review_description: Every time I try to play the game it flips my screen upside-down I'm sure it's a good game but that glitch needs to be fixed but there is no rush

Everything is upside down. It is hard for me to move around and I can’t do anything. 
￼

developer_response.body:
We're sorry to hear that you were experiencing an issue with the game appearing upside down on your Quest. We have investigated the issue and identified the root cause.

We have now implemented a fix for this problem, and you should no longer experience the issue of the game appearing upside down. Please make sure that your game is up to date, and if the issue persists, please let us know.

Thank you for your patience and for bringing this to our attention.

reviews.review_title: Only one level, and doesn't save jems

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to leave a review of our game. 
We're sorry to hear that your experience was not positive. 
We appreciate your feedback and would like to address your concerns.

We would like to inform you that we have implemented an additional game mode which can be played for free, in addition to the one level that is already available for free. 

We hope that this new game mode will provide you with more options for gameplay and keep you engaged with the game.

We will investigate the issue with the gems and make sure that they are working properly. 

We value your feedback and hope that you will give our game another chance. Thank you for playing our game and for your support.

Best regards,
Bullet Master Run Team

We have now implemented a fix for this problem, and you should no longer experience the issue of the game appearing upside down. Please make sure that your game is up to date, and if the issue persists, please let us know.

Thank you for your patience and for bringing this to our attention. We hope you continue to enjoy the game without any further issues.
